children.heading: Transfer of agricultural import and entry inspection functions
children.label: a Transfer of agricultural import and entry inspection functions
children.text: There shall be transferred to the Secretary the functions of the Secretary of Agriculture relating to agricultural import and entry inspection activities under the laws specified in subsection (b).

children.heading: Covered animal and plant protection laws
children.label: b Covered animal and plant protection laws

children.text: The Act commonly known as the Virus-Serum-Toxin Act (the eighth paragraph under the heading “Bureau of Animal Industry” in the Act of ; et seq.).March 4, 191321 U.S.C. 151
(commonly known as the Honeybee Act; ).Section 1 of the Act of August 31, 19227 U.S.C. 281
Title III of the Federal Seed Act ( et seq.).7 U.S.C. 1581
The Plant Protection Act ( et seq.).7 U.S.C. 7701
The Animal Health Protection Act (subtitle E of title X of ; et seq.).Public Law 107–1717 U.S.C. 8301
The Lacey Act Amendments of 1981 ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 3371
Section 11 of the Endangered Species Act of 1973 ().16 U.S.C. 1540

children.heading: Exclusion of quarantine activities
children.label: c Exclusion of quarantine activities
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “functions” does not include any quarantine activities carried out under the laws specified in subsection (b).

children.heading: Compliance with Department of Agriculture regulations
children.label: 1 Compliance with Department of Agriculture regulations
children.text: The authority transferred pursuant to subsection (a) shall be exercised by the Secretary in accordance with the regulations, policies, and procedures issued by the Secretary of Agriculture regarding the administration of the laws specified in subsection (b).

children.heading: Rulemaking coordination
children.label: 2 Rulemaking coordination
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall coordinate with the Secretary whenever the Secretary of Agriculture prescribes regulations, policies, or procedures for administering the functions transferred under subsection (a) under a law specified in subsection (b).

children.heading: Effective administration
children.label: 3 Effective administration
children.text: The Secretary, in consultation with the Secretary of Agriculture, may issue such directives and guidelines as are necessary to ensure the effective use of personnel of the Department of Homeland Security to carry out the functions transferred pursuant to subsection (a).

children.heading: Agreement required; revision
children.label: 1 Agreement required; revision
children.text: Before the end of the transition period, as defined in , the Secretary of Agriculture and the Secretary shall enter into an agreement to effectuate the transfer of functions required by subsection (a) of this section. The Secretary of Agriculture and the Secretary may jointly revise the agreement as necessary thereafter.section 541 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: The supervision by the Secretary of Agriculture of the training of employees of the Secretary to carry out the functions transferred pursuant to subsection (a).

children.label: B
children.text: The transfer of funds to the Secretary under subsection (f).

children.label: A
children.text: Authority for the Secretary to perform functions delegated to the Animal and Plant Health Inspection Service of the Department of Agriculture regarding the protection of domestic livestock and plants, but not transferred to the Secretary pursuant to subsection (a).

children.label: B
children.text: Authority for the Secretary of Agriculture to use employees of the Department of Homeland Security to carry out authorities delegated to the Animal and Plant Health Inspection Service regarding the protection of domestic livestock and plants.

children.heading: Periodic transfer of funds to Department of Homeland Security
children.label: f Periodic transfer of funds to Department of Homeland Security

children.heading: Transfer of funds
children.label: 1 Transfer of funds
children.text: Out of funds collected by fees authorized under sections 136 and 136a of title 21, the Secretary of Agriculture shall transfer, from time to time in accordance with the agreement under subsection (e), to the Secretary funds for activities carried out by the Secretary for which such fees were collected.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: The proportion of fees collected pursuant to such sections that are transferred to the Secretary under this subsection may not exceed the proportion of the costs incurred by the Secretary to all costs incurred to carry out activities funded by such fees.

children.heading: Transfer of Department of Agriculture employees
children.label: g Transfer of Department of Agriculture employees
children.text: Not later than the completion of the transition period defined under , the Secretary of Agriculture shall transfer to the Secretary not more than 3,200 full-time equivalent positions of the Department of Agriculture.section 541 of this title
